name.en: Raviel, Lord of Phantasms - Sacred Beast of Endless Eternity
name.ja: <ruby>無<rt>む</rt></ruby><ruby>窮<rt>きゅう</rt></ruby>の<ruby>三<rt>さん</rt></ruby><ruby>幻<rt>げん</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby>－<ruby>幻<rt>げん</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby><ruby>皇<rt>おう</rt></ruby>ラビエル
name.zh-CN: 无穷之三幻魔－幻魔皇拉比艾尔

text.en: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with a "Sacred Beast" card. You can reveal this card in your hand; add 1 "Sacred Beast" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Raviel, Lord of Phantasms - Sacred Beast of Endless Eternity", then discard 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Raviel, Lord of Phantasms - Sacred Beast of Endless Eternity" once per turn. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 2 other "Sacred Beast" monsters; destroy as many monsters your opponent controls as possible, and if you do, this card gains 1000 ATK for each card destroyed by this effect.
text.zh-CN: 此卡不可通常召唤。仅可通过“三幻魔”卡的效果特殊召唤。此卡名的①效果1回合仅可使用1次。①：向对手出示手牌的此卡可以发动。从牌组将“无穷之三幻魔－幻魔皇拉比艾尔”以外的1只“三幻魔”怪兽加入手牌。然后，挑选自己的1张手牌舍弃。②：在每个自己・对手回合中1次，解放自己场上的其他2只“三幻魔”怪兽可以发动。将对手场上的怪兽全部破坏，此卡的攻击力上升所破坏的数量×1000的数值。
